name: Maui Onion Eggroll (Lumpia)
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces chicken breast, boned and skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Julienne the chicken and sauté it in peanut oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add ginger, garlic (minced), sherry wine, and oyster sauce to the pan.
3. Stir in julienned vegetables until they are tender.
4. Remove from heat and let cool in the refrigerator.
5. Place mixture in the center of each lumpia wrapper.
6. Fold two opposite sides over the filling.
7. Roll the wrappers loosely.
8. Moisten the edges with egg whites.
9. Deep-fry in oil until golden brown.
10. Makes 14 rolls
